name: taro-lucide-tabbar
description: Generate PNG icons for WeChat miniprogram tabbar from Lucide icons

scripts.test: npm run build && vitest run src/__tests__/cli-e2e.test.ts src/__tests__/utils.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build && vitest run --coverage src/__tests__/cli-e2e.test.ts src/__tests__/utils.test.ts
